description: PLMKR Brand Connect knowledge base — load order for system prompt assembly

files.description: 8-dimension Deal Quality Score rubric — weights, anchors, hard gates (Dim-3 Partner Quality, Dim-5 Risk & Exposure), composite formula
Partnership value-creation logic, strategic fit assessment, artist brand partnership taxonomy, audience alignment by genre, alliance lifecycle
Deal economic structures, net economics vs. headline consideration, kill fee standards, payment schedule assessment, Dim-2 application for artist brand deals
Time/scope/optionality axes, exclusivity standards, IP ownership, creative approval standards, foreclosing term identification, Dim-5 hard gate analysis
5-domain partner due diligence framework, credibility scoring, disqualifying vs. uncertain boundary, music artist brand partnership diligence patterns
Brand partnership strategic rationale tests, co-marketing structures, DSP/platform deal assessment, reputational risk assessment
Three output templates: Deal Quality Assessment Memo, Partnership Brief, Contract Red Flag Checklist

Deal origination modes and leverage implications, pre-negotiation information stack, opening position doctrine by deal type, term hierarchy (defend vs. trade), counter-offer sequencing, walk-away triggers, common brand negotiating tactics and counters, intermediary dynamics, LOI vs. direct-to-contract close mechanics, and post-deal activation protocol

notes.entity_wall: These files are PLMKR-owned originals. Do not reference external sources, rubric identifiers, or entity names from source material.
notes.mock_mode: All assessment routes default to BRAND_CONNECT_MOCK_MODE=true — no live Anthropic calls during testing.
